arts.ttl: Hugo Ekitiké on filling Omar Marmoush's boots at Eintracht Frankfurt, European ambitions and more
arts.sum: Ekitiké: "I think it’s partly because we had a very young group of players who needed some time to play together, to get to know each other, and to build something. Ekitiké: "I think the Champions League is at the back of our minds, but we’re not focusing on it too much right now because there are still a lot of league games to come.

arts.ttl: Who'd play Haaland in a film? Erling answers internet’s most asked questions!
arts.sum: Erling Haaland joins us to answer your best fan questions... Does he watch his own highlights on YouTube? Is he going to see Oasis? Where does he go on holiday? All of this and more...

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola drops Ilkay Gundogan bombshell ahead of FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Ilkay Gundogan returned to Manchester City in the summer and, despite a difficult year for those at the Etihad, the German's time at the club looks set to be extended

arts.sum: Pep Guardiola’s side are out to record back-to-back wins this week

arts.ttl: Bobb, Akanji, Stones - Man City injury latest and return dates with four to miss Plymouth FA Cup tie

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Man City face 'never before seen' situation in Wirtz battle
arts.sum: Bayern Munich would be willing to go into debt to secure the signing of Florian Wirtz, according to honorary president Uli Hoeness. Nevertheless, Wirtz continues to be the subject of rampant transfer speculation, with Arsenal, Man City and, chief among them, Bayern Munich perpetually linked with him.

arts.ttl: Saturday's FA Cup predictions including Man City vs. Plymouth Argyle
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's FA Cup fixtures, including Manchester City vs. Plymouth Argyle.

arts.ttl: Fresh Jack Grealish injury doubt vs Plymouth sums up the Man City dilemma that has no solution
arts.sum: Jack Grealish is a fitness doubt for Manchester City's FA Cup clash with Plymouth as Pep Guardiola admitted 'question marks' over his injury record.

arts.ttl: I had my best year in football aged 17 at Man City - now I am rebuilding my career abroad
arts.sum: Jacob Davenport chats to the Manchester Evening News about his City career and

arts.ttl: Why Jack Grealish is in danger of running out of chances at Man City - and what the £100m star can do to get back to his best at the Etihad, writes JACK GAUGHAN
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: This was supposed to be the reset, the turning of a page, the season Grealish returned to being Grealish. Last year, the post-Treble comedown, was effectively a write-off.
